content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Weights Distributing". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1343/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of boxes. The second line contains n integers, the weights of the boxes.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of operations required to distribute the weights evenly.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the minimum number of operations required to distribute the weights evenly.
